rationale: Highest recurrence (6+ sessions with identical prompt), user explicitly requested automation, existing skill not wired up
5 sessions, user tried and failed to automate, partial infrastructure exists but pipeline incomplete
User explicitly asked for automation, ongoing Mint-to-NixOS migration makes this increasingly important
5 sessions with manual MCP verification, scripts exist but no session-start auto-check
3 sessions, lower recurrence but each release cycle is painful, CI partially exists
2 sessions, growing pattern as more projects adopt harness, but still early signal
